description: Extreme text-speak abbreviations throughout. Two events: Q1 review tonight at 7 PM at Bob's, and a presentation tomorrow at 10 AM.

events.title: Q1 Review
events.reasoning: Despite heavy abbreviations, Alice proposes a Q1 numbers review tonight ('2nite') at 7 PM ('7pm') at Bob's, confirmed by all three participants.
events.assumptions: Duration assumed 1 hour based on 'like an hr'. '2nite' = tonight = 2026-02-20.

events.title: Q1 Presentation
events.reasoning: Alice references a 'big pres 2morrow @ 10am' which translates to a presentation tomorrow (2026-02-21) at 10 AM.
events.assumptions: Duration assumed 1 hour. '2morrow' = 2026-02-21. 'Pres' interpreted as presentation.

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 2 events: a Q1 review tonight at 7 PM at Bob's with Alice, Bob, and Carol, and a Q1 presentation tomorrow at 10 AM.

notes: Reference datetime is Friday 2026-02-20. '2nite' = today, '2morrow' = 2026-02-21. Heavy abbreviations: r=are, u=you, wut=what, kk=okay, gr8=great, l8r=later, lmk=let me know.
